layout.title: Community - OpenAppCLI
layout.description: Join the OpenAppCLI community and contribute to the universal application automation platform

hero.title: Join Our Community
hero.subtitle: Together We Build Universal Automation
hero.description: OpenAppCLI is more than a tool—it's a community-driven movement towards universal application automation. Join developers worldwide in shaping the future of AI-powered automation.

contribute.title: Contribute to OpenAppCLI
contribute.subtitle: Every Contribution Matters
contribute.description: Whether you're a developer, designer, or automation enthusiast, there are many ways to contribute to the OpenAppCLI ecosystem.

ways.title: Code Contributions
ways.description: Submit pull requests, fix bugs, and add new features to the core platform

ways.title: Documentation
ways.description: Help improve documentation, write tutorials, and create guides

ways.title: Bug Reports
ways.description: Report issues and help us identify and fix bugs

ways.title: Translations
ways.description: Help translate OpenAppCLI into your native language

marketplace.title: Automation Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Share and Discover Automation Scripts
marketplace.description: Browse, share, and download automation scripts created by the community. From simple tasks to complex workflows, find what you need or contribute your own.

categories.name: Web Automation
categories.description: Scripts for web scraping, form filling, and browser automation

categories.name: Desktop Apps
categories.description: Automation scripts for desktop applications and system tools

categories.name: Mobile Apps
categories.description: Scripts for mobile app testing and automation

categories.name: Game Automation
categories.description: Game bots, farming scripts, and automation tools

categories.name: AI Integration
categories.description: Scripts that integrate with AI models and services

categories.name: Data Processing
categories.description: Data extraction, processing, and analysis scripts

contributors.title: Our Contributors
contributors.subtitle: Building Together
contributors.description: Meet the amazing people who make OpenAppCLI possible. From code to documentation, every contribution counts.

discussions.title: Join the Discussion
discussions.subtitle: Connect with the Community
discussions.description: Share ideas, ask questions, and collaborate with other OpenAppCLI users and developers.

events.title: Community Events
events.subtitle: Learn and Connect
events.description: Join workshops, webinars, and meetups to learn from experts and connect with fellow automation enthusiasts.

upcoming.title: Advanced MCP Protocol Integration
upcoming.description: Learn how to integrate AI Agents with applications using the MCP protocol

upcoming.title: Building Custom Automation Scripts
upcoming.description: Hands-on workshop for creating custom automation solutions

upcoming.title: OpenAppCLI Community Summit
upcoming.description: Annual community gathering and roadmap discussion

resources.title: Learning Resources
resources.subtitle: Master OpenAppCLI
resources.description: Comprehensive resources to help you get started and become an OpenAppCLI expert.

showcase.title: Community Showcase
showcase.subtitle: Amazing Projects Built with OpenAppCLI
showcase.description: Discover what the community has built using OpenAppCLI. From enterprise solutions to personal projects, see the power of universal automation in action.

cases.title: E-commerce Automation Suite
cases.description: Complete automation for inventory management, price monitoring, and order processing

cases.title: Social Media Management Tool
cases.description: Automated posting, engagement tracking, and content scheduling across platforms

cases.title: Testing Framework Integration
cases.description: Seamless integration with popular testing frameworks for automated UI testing

cta.title: Ready to Join the Community?
cta.subtitle: Start Contributing Today
cta.description: Whether you're writing code, reporting bugs, or sharing ideas, your contribution matters. Join us in building the future of universal automation.
